High: `backend/tests/InventoryFlow.IntegrationTests/Api/ProductEndpointsTests.cs:68-84` does not deterministically exercise the persistence-conflict handler at `backend/src/InventoryFlow.Infrastructure/Products/EfProductCatalog.cs:23-25`. It has no barrier ensuring both requests complete `AnyAsync` (lines 15-16) before either saves, and only asserts HTTP statuses. The conflict can therefore come solely from the second request’s pre-check, leaving SQL unique-index exception mapping unverified.
